title: kernel security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.14.0-611.35.1]
- Disable UKI signing [Orabug: 36571828]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.5]
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34729535]
- Add Oracle Linux IMA certificates
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985764]

[5.14.0-611.35.1]
- page_pool: Fix use-after-free in page_pool_recycle_in_ring (Paolo Abeni) [RHEL-137841] {CVE-2025-38129}
- exfat: fix double free in delayed_free (CKI Backport Bot) [RHEL-146403] {CVE-2025-38206}
full_text:
[5.14.0-611.35.1]
- Disable UKI signing [Orabug: 36571828]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.5]
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34729535]
- Add Oracle Linux IMA certificates
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985764]

[5.14.0-611.35.1]
- page_pool: Fix use-after-free in page_pool_recycle_in_ring (Paolo Abeni) [RHEL-137841] {CVE-2025-38129}
- exfat: fix double free in delayed_free (CKI Backport Bot) [RHEL-146403] {CVE-2025-38206}

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3066.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-38129.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-38206.html
